title: Age Lock Indicator
description: Spot age-locked baby mobs at a glance with a subtle, configurable golden dandelion indicator.
body:
## Why this mod exists

The golden dandelion is great. Feed it to a baby mob, and it stays small forever. The problem? Once the particles dissapear, there's no way to tell which of your animals are permanently locked and which will eventually grow up. This mod fixes that with a single, unobtrusive icon.

---

## What this mod does
Age Lock Indicator adds a clean floating icon above baby mobs that are actually age-locked.

It is designed to be subtle enough for normal gameplay.

The indicator:

- stays within a short render distance
- respects line of sight, so it does not show through walls
- scales slightly with distance
- is fully client-side

---

## Visibility options

You can choose when the indicator should appear:

- Only while crouching (default)
- Only while holding a golden dandelion
- Always visible

By default, the mod keeps the indicator unobtrusive instead of filling your screen with icons.

---

## Compatibility

Age Lock Indicator is client-side only and does not need to be installed on a server.

It has been tested with performance mods such as [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast), and with shaders through [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris).

---

## Requirements

### Required
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)


#### Optional (for changing the config in-game)
- [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
- [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

---

## Report bugs

Is there a bug you want to report, or is there a feature you want to see added in this mod? Join the [Discord server.](https://discord.gg/HfNH5QtYxE)
